segments.text: MAN: Excuse me. Would you mind if I asked you some questions?
segments.translation: 男士：您好。请问您介意我问您一些问题吗?

segments.text: We're doing a survey on transport.
segments.translation: 我们正在做关于交通的调研。

segments.text: SADIE: Yes, that's OK.
segments.translation: 萨迪：好的，没问题。

segments.text: MAN: First of all, can I take your name?
segments.translation: 男士：首先，可以问下您的名字吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Yes. It's Sadie Jones.
segments.translation: 萨迪：当然。我叫萨迪·琼斯。

segments.text: MAN: Thanks very much.
segments.translation: 男士：非常感谢。

segments.text: And could I have your date of birth - just the year will do, actually.
segments.translation: 可以问下您生日吗？实际上，出生年份就可以了。

segments.text: Is that all right?
segments.translation: 方便吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Yes, that's fine. It's 1991.
segments.translation: 萨迪：没问题。1991年。

segments.text: MAN: So next your postcode, please.
segments.translation: 男士：接下来麻烦说一下您的邮编。

segments.text: SADIE: It's DW30 7YZ.
MAN: Great. Thanks. Is that in Wells?
segments.translation: 男士：太好了。非常感谢。这是韦尔斯的邮编吗？

segments.text: SADIE: No it's actually in Harborne - Wells isn't far from there, though.
segments.translation: 萨迪：不是的。是哈勃恩。离韦尔斯也不远。

segments.text: MAN: I really like that area.
segments.translation: 男士：我很喜欢那一片。

segments.text: My grandmother lived there when I was a kid.
segments.translation: 我小的时候我的祖母住在那里。

segments.text: SADIE: Yes, it is nice.
segments.translation: 萨迪：是的，那里很不错。

segments.text: MAN: Right, so now I want to ask you some questions about how you travelled here today.
segments.translation: 男士：是呢。那么现在我想问您一些问题，关于您今天使用的交通方式。

segments.text: Did you use public transport?
segments.translation: 您乘坐了公共交通吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Yes. I came by bus.
segments.translation: 萨迪：是的，我搭乘公交车来的。

segments.text: MAN: OK. And that was today.
segments.translation: 男士：是今天来的。

segments.text: It's the 24th of April, isn't it?
segments.translation: 今天是4月24日，对吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Isn't it the 25th?
segments.translation: 萨迪：不是25号吗？

segments.text: No, actually, you're right.
segments.translation: 不，您是对的。

segments.text: MAN: Ha ha. And what was the reason for your trip today?
segments.translation: 男士：哈哈。您今天为什么来这里？

segments.text: I can see you've got some shopping with you.
segments.translation: 看得出来您购物了。

segments.text: SADIE: Yes. I did some shopping but the main reason I came here was to go to the dentist.
segments.translation: 萨迪：是的，我买了一些东西，但是我来主要是看牙医的。

segments.text: MAN: That's not much fun.
segments.translation: 男士：那就不太好玩儿了。

segments.text: Hope it was nothing serious.
segments.translation: 希望没什么严重的问题。

segments.text: SADIE: No, it was just a check-up. It's fine.
segments.translation: 萨迪：没事的。只是检查，都还好。

segments.text: MAN: Good. Do you normally travel by bus into the city centre?
segments.translation: 男士：好的。您通常都是乘坐公交车来市中心吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Yes. I stopped driving in ages ago because parking was so difficult to find and it costs so much.
segments.translation: 萨迪：是的。停车太难，停车费还贵，我几年前就不开车了。

segments.text: MAN: I see.
segments.translation: 男士：明白了。

segments.text: SADIE: The bus is much more convenient too.
segments.translation: 萨迪：公交车也方便多了。

segments.text: It only takes about 30 minutes.
segments.translation: 只需要30分钟。

segments.text: MAN: That's good. So where did you start your journey?
segments.translation: 男士：挺好的。那您今天是从哪里乘车出发的？

segments.text: SADIE: At the bus stop on Claxby Street.
segments.translation: 萨迪：克拉克斯比街的公交站。

segments.text: MAN: Is that C-L-A-X-B-Y?
segments.translation: 男士：是写作C-L-A-X-B-Y吗？

segments.text: SADIE: That's right.
segments.translation: 萨迪：是的。

segments.text: MAN: And how satisfied with the service are you?
segments.translation: 男士：您对公交车服务的满意度如何？

segments.text: Do you have any complaints?
segments.translation: 有什么不满吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Well, as I said, it's very convenient and quick when it's on time, but this morning it was late. Only about 10 minutes, but still.
segments.translation: 萨迪：嗯，就像我之前说的，公交车准时的时候，还是非常方便快捷的。但是今天早上公交车晚点了。虽然只晚了10分钟，但是确实是晚了。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, I understand that's annoying.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，我理解，挺烦人的。

segments.text: And what about the timetable?
segments.translation: 关于公交车运行时间表呢？

segments.text: Do you have any comments about that?
segments.translation: 您有什么想说的吗？

segments.text: SADIE: Mmm. I suppose I mainly use the bus during the day, but any time I've been in town in the evening - for dinner or at the cinema - I've noticed you have to wait a long time for a bus - there aren't that many.
segments.translation: 萨迪：嗯。我主要是白天的时候坐公交车。但是每当我在晚上在市区看电影或者用餐的时候，我发现需要等很长时间。晚上的时候车次不多。

segments.text: MAN: OK, thanks. So now I'd like to ask you about your car use.
segments.translation: 男士：好的，谢谢您。那我现在想要问一些关于您开车的问题。

segments.text: SADIE: Well, I have got a car but I don't use it that often.
segments.translation: 萨迪：没问题。我有一辆车，但是不经常开。

segments.text: Mainly just to go to the supermarket. But that's about it really.
segments.translation: 主要去超市的时候开，仅此而已。

segments.text: My husband uses it at the weekends to go to the golf club.
segments.translation: 我丈夫周末的时候开车去高尔夫俱乐部。

segments.text: MAN: And what about a bicycle?
segments.translation: 男士：那自行车呢？

segments.text: SADIE: I don't actually have one at the moment.
segments.translation: 萨迪：实际上我现在没有自行车。

segments.text: MAN: What about the city bikes you can rent?
segments.translation: 男士：那种可以租的公共自行车呢？

segments.text: Do you ever use those?
segments.translation: 您之前骑过吗？

segments.text: SADIE: No - I'm not keen on cycling there because of all the pollution.
segments.translation: 萨迪：没有。因为污染，我不喜欢骑自行车。

segments.text: But I would like to get a bike - it would be good to use it to get to work.
segments.translation: 但是，我想要买一辆自行车，骑着上班应该挺好的。

segments.text: MAN: So why haven't you got one now?
segments.translation: 男士：那为什么到现在还没买呢？

segments.text: SADIE: Well, I live in a flat - on the second floor and it doesn't have any storage - so we'd have to leave it in the hall outside the flat.
segments.translation: 萨迪：我住在公寓，是二楼，没有储藏室。所以不得不把自行车放在公寓外面的走廊上。

segments.text: MAN: I see. OK. Well, I think that's all ...
segments.translation: 男士：我明白了。好的。我想以上就是全部问题了。
